reviews.comment:
Bien. No esperé y fui atendida con amabilidad. La queja por los precios de la nafta no le corresponden a esta gasolinera, qué le vamos a hacer.

(Translated by Google)
Good. I didn't have to wait and was served politely. The complaint about gas prices isn't the responsibility of this gas station, what can you do?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMEt6SmFnEAE

reviews.comment:
A veces vas antes de las 06:00 a.m. y no tienen nafta Infinia o no tienen sistema o algo está a medias, no siempre pero suele pasar seguido,

(Translated by Google)
Sometimes you go before 6:00 a.m. and they don't have Infinia gas or they don't have the system or something is half-finished, not always but it happens often,

Muy buena atención en Full. Pedí un café con leche con trenzado de jamon y queso , fue excelente . El baño super limpio.
